rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
generic_rules: Maintain the authoritative source of component structure from the input AADL model
Ensure all AGREE annex blocks are properly scoped according to AADL architecture
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting new annex blocks
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
